name: Navin B
headline: Tech Maverick | AI & Robotics Scholar | Full-Stack Dev (Flutter • Django • Python) | 5x Hackathon Champion | AI Solution Architect | Startup Visionary | Fresh Mind, Seasoned Insights | Always Evolving
summary:
Hey, I'm Navin B — an AI & Robotics Honors Scholar and passionate Python Developer dedicated to building scalable, intelligent, and meaningful tech solutions.

Currently pursuing BTech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Sri Sairam Engineering College (CGPA: 8.45), I bring a strong blend of technical expertise, creative problem-solving, and real-world impact through hands-on projects and multi-domain internships.

What I Do Best:
- Full-Stack & Backend Development: Proficient in Python, Django, Flutter, and Firebase. Built scalable apps and AI-powered systems with 90%+ accuracy, improving system performance by 40%.
- AI for Real Impact: Developed healthcare-focused platforms like Mediwise, automated ICD code matching using Mistral AI, and built smart content parsing systems using ChromaDB.
- Hackathon Champion: 5x Winner (Ideathon, Solveathon, Innovathon, Genesis 1.0, NDLI Hackathon) — I thrive in competitive, high-impact environments.
- Internship Experience: Contributed to dynamic teams at Zootoca Technologies, 114 AI Innovation, and Maestrominds, building performance-optimized applications with real business value.

Why I Stand Out:
I approach every problem with a fresh mind and seasoned insights — combining a strong grasp of fundamentals with a passion for creative, user-focused innovation. I believe in learning by building, collaborating, and pushing boundaries through experimentation.

My Vision:
Short Term: Master the tech stacks I work with (Python, Flutter, Django, OpenCV, Firebase) and build a solid foundation in CS fundamentals, system design, and software architecture.
Long Term: Launch a tech startup focused on AI-driven healthcare and impactful automation, and lead with purpose, innovation, and empathy.

I'm open to internships and entry-level roles where I can grow, contribute, and innovate with a forward-thinking team.
address: No 24/54, Jambuli Bharathi Street, Kodungaiyur, Chennai - 600118
looking_for: Internships and entry-level roles in AI, Backend Development, Full-Stack Engineering, or AI Solution Architecture
